content.text: Based on the search results, the Wikipedia article on the *This Is For* World Tour shows the full tour schedule.

citations.cited_text: TWICE “THIS IS FOR” WORLD TOUR DATES: 2025 DATES (PREVIOUSLY ANNOUNCED): Sat Oct 04 – Bulacan – Philippine Arena · Sat Oct 11 – Singapore – Singapore ...
citations.title: TWICE Announces ‘This Is For’ 2026 World Tour - Pollstar News

content.text: TWICE's Singapore stop on the "This Is For" World Tour was at the **Singapore Indoor Stadium** on **October 11–12, 2025**
— not at Singapore National Stadium on November 14–15, 2026.

citations.cited_text: Their sixth concert tour, the This Is For World Tour, began in Incheon in July 2025 and concluded in July 2026.
citations.title: List of Twice concert tours - Wikipedia

content.text: Their sixth concert tour, the *This Is For* World Tour, began in Incheon in July 2025 and concluded in July 2026

, with no Singapore National Stadium dates in November 2026 found anywhere. Additionally, the raw candidate title references "ENHYPEN World Tour BLOOD SAGA 2026 – Macau," which conflicts entirely with the claimed artist (TWICE) and city (Singapore).
